problems.name: Polyarthritis, undifferentiated
problems.notes: Symmetric small-joint involvement (hands, wrists, ankles) with morning stiffness >1 hour. ANA positive at 1:80 at initial workup. Started on hydroxychloroquine empirically at urgent care 1/12/2026 pending rheumatology evaluation.

problems.name: Alopecia, diffuse
problems.notes: Diffuse non-scarring scalp hair thinning. Concurrent with arthritis symptoms.

problems.name: Hypothyroidism, subclinical
problems.notes: TSH 5.32 at urgent care presentation. Started on levothyroxine 25 mcg daily empirically. Free T4 not measured at initial visit.

problems.name: Loss of health insurance coverage
problems.notes: Patient lost Medicaid coverage during pandemic redetermination. Has been unable to navigate reinstatement; uses urgent care and ED for episodic needs. Major barrier to specialty follow-up.
